title: MetaENCODE
description: Machine learning-powered web application that helps researchers discover related ENCODE datasets by transforming experiment metadata into embeddings and computing similarity using cosine similarity and nearest neighbor search.

title: Cuisine Classifier
description: Machine learning classifier to distinguish American vs. European recipes using nutritional data and ingredient text, achieving ~79% accuracy with a Random Forest model.

title: YumSum
description: Streamlit webapp that recommends restaurants based on user input (cost, cuisine, location, and number of results). Summarizes and combines yelp reviews into one large overview of a particular restaurant.

title: Learn.Fight.Protect.
description: Website that educates about gun safety in the United States. Used webscraping to power a fact generator button.
